errorApiChanged.message: API NotebookLM-la chanjé. Fò ou mété-y a jou.
errorApiChanged.description: User-facing error when API structure is modified

errorAuthExpired.message: Sésyon a'w bout. Souplé, wokonèkté-w ankò anlè NotebookLM.

errorUploadSessionMissing.message: Bab lè pou voyé fichyé-la an kayé-la.
errorUploadSessionMissing.description: User-facing error when upload URL is missing

errorTimeout.message: Wòkèt-la pwan twòp tan. Souplé véyé konèksyon a-w.

errorInjectionFailed.message: Nou pa ni dwa aktivé klipè-la asi paj-la sa.
errorInjectionFailed.description: User-facing error when script injection fails

errorUnknown.message: Nou pa sav ola bab la sa soti. Gadé ka i ka fèt anlè konsòl-la.
